items.name: robinhood-ai-dev-sniper
items.description: 🏹 RobinHood — AI Dev Sniper: high-performance Go trading bot for Ethereum & EVM chains. Uniswap V2/V3 sniper with Flashbots bundle protection, multi-wallet coordinated buys, real-time mempool monitoring, AI deving autopilot, Twitter/X signal parsing, top-dev tracking, volume bot and ERC-20 token creator. Base, BNB Chain, Arbitrum.
